text.title: verb-object-tool-naming Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for verb-object-tool-naming as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Polymorphic verb tools that take an action enum (manage_files(action="copy"|"move"|"delete", ...)).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model has to read the description and remember which kwargs are valid per action. Atomic verbs (copy_file, move_file, delete_file) are self-describing and have typed schemas the runtime can validate.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Long names burn context budget, dilute the verb, and hurt lexical match with the user's request.
